_comment: Bad case 02 — READY_FOR_DEPARTURE on Ground frequency at KPAO (US). Pilot has taxied but stays on Ground when calling for takeoff clearance. US Ground correctly redirects with 'contact Tower on {freq}' — the plugin requires the pilot to initiate comms with Tower (plugin does not simulate proactive Tower calls). State pre-advances to TOWER_CONTACT so pilot's first call on the new frequency goes straight to clearance. Guards the TAXI_CLEARED + READY_FOR_DEPARTURE template (US towered).
name: Bad case 02 — ready for departure on Ground freq (KPAO US)

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.note: Setup — taxi clearance so we are at the holding point in TAXI_CLEARED
say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo at the ramp ready to taxi

say.note: Part A — pilot calls Ground for takeoff (still wrong freq for clearance)
say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo holding short ready for departure

say.note: Part B — pilot switches to Tower and re-calls

say.text: Palo Alto Tower November One Two Three Alpha Bravo ready for departure
